prompt: Write a JavaScript function that takes an array of numbers and returns a new array with each doubled.
Write an async JavaScript function getJson(url) that fetches JSON and returns the parsed object.
Write a JavaScript function that returns true if a string is a palindrome.
Write a JavaScript function debounce(fn, ms) that returns a debounced version of fn.
Write a JavaScript function flatten(arr) that flattens an array one level deep.
Write a JavaScript function that counts word frequencies in a string, returning an object.
